title: How to Build a Bold & Disruptive Brand

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
We invite you to a live webinar: How to Build a Bold & Disruptive Brand
with Emmanuel Cohen, Head of Marketing at monday CRM.
In today’s crowded market, features aren’t enough. In this session, Emmanuel will show how even “unsexy” products can become beloved brands, through bold storytelling, emotional strategy, and a serious shake-up of the status quo.
You’ll learn:
How to turn pain points into emotional loyalty
Why storytelling beats feature-dumping
How to move from “good marketing” to iconic branding
Wednesday, May 7th

Live in The Grand Hall, MANSION’s marketing community

Register now! Seats are limited.
